description: Perform a complete audit of StartupPilot AI and determine whether the system actually works as advertised. Trust only observed behavior, do not trust documentation/implementation claims.
instructions: Your task is NOT to add features. Your task is NOT to improve architecture. Your task is NOT to refactor code unless a defect is proven. Treat the project as if it were handed to you by another engineering team. Trust only observed behavior. Do not trust documentation. Do not trust implementation claims. Do not trust test names. Only trust execution results.

userStories.title: Phase 1 - Environment Validation
userStories.description: Verify: Python version compatibility, dependency installation, virtual environment setup, environment variable handling, configuration loading.
acceptanceCriteria: Record PASS, FAIL, or WARNING for Python version compatibility
Record PASS, FAIL, or WARNING for Dependency installation
Record PASS, FAIL, or WARNING for Virtual environment setup
Record PASS, FAIL, or WARNING for Environment variable handling
Record PASS, FAIL, or WARNING for Configuration loading

userStories.title: Phase 2 - Codebase Health Audit
userStories.description: Analyze: folder structure, imports, circular dependencies, dead code, unused modules, duplicate logic, configuration consistency.
acceptanceCriteria: Identify critical codebase health issues
Identify medium codebase health issues
Identify low codebase health issues

userStories.title: Phase 3 - Startup Validation
userStories.description: Verify Backend startup, Frontend startup, and Docker startup. Run start.py, backend/main.py, and frontend/app.py.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify they start successfully
Verify no startup exceptions, hidden failures, or hanging processes

userStories.title: Phase 4 - API Validation
userStories.description: Test every API endpoint (/health, /agents, /analyze, /upload, /status/{id}, /report/{id}, /wiki/{id}, /research/{id}).
acceptanceCriteria: Test with valid requests, invalid requests, malformed requests, missing data, and timeout handling
Record status code, latency, response schema, and errors for each endpoint

userStories.title: Phase 5 - End-to-End Workflow Validation
userStories.description: Run demo-healthcare and verify the entire workflow (User Input -> Research -> Market Analysis -> Competitor Analysis -> SWOT -> Business Strategy -> Human Approval -> Research Planner -> Knowledge Navigation -> Evidence Collection -> AutoGen Discussion -> Architecture Design -> Cost Analysis -> Report Generation).
acceptanceCriteria: For every step, verify it was executed, produced output, updated state, and persisted results

userStories.title: Phase 6 - LangGraph Validation
userStories.description: Verify LangGraph orchestration in detail.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify graph compilation
Verify node execution and state transitions
Verify checkpoint handling and retry logic
Verify conditional routing
Inspect actual execution traces

userStories.title: Phase 7 - CrewAI Validation
userStories.description: Verify CrewAI agent orchestration in detail.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify agent creation
Verify task execution and agent coordination
Verify output generation
Confirm agents actually execute rather than being stubbed

userStories.title: Phase 8 - AutoGen Validation
userStories.description: Verify AutoGen autonomous discussion integration.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify discussion generation and multi-agent conversations
Verify consensus generation
Verify transcript storage
Confirm AutoGen is truly used and not simulated

userStories.title: Phase 9 - Knowledge Wiki Validation
userStories.description: Upload real documents and verify Knowledge Wiki behaviors.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify compilation and topic creation
Verify entity extraction and backlink creation
Verify page persistence
Inspect generated wiki files to confirm correct contents

userStories.title: Phase 10 - Research Platform Validation
userStories.description: Verify Research Planner, Multi-Hop Navigation, Evidence Collection, Research Traces, and Research Memory.
acceptanceCriteria: Create task and generate plan
Navigate and collect evidence
Save memory
Verify actual behavior at each step

userStories.title: Phase 11 - RAG / Context Engineering Validation
userStories.description: Verify context engineering and retrieval behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify context assembly and retrieval logic
Verify wiki-first behavior and fallback retrieval
Verify token budgeting
Confirm context is assembled correctly

userStories.title: Phase 12 - Human-in-the-Loop Validation
userStories.description: Verify Human-in-the-Loop workflows.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify Approve, Reject, and Modify options
Verify pausing and resuming the workflow
Confirm the workflow behaves correctly when interrupted

userStories.title: Phase 13 - Frontend Validation
userStories.description: Open every frontend page and test interface components.
acceptanceCriteria: Test Home, Analysis, Agent Monitor, Discussion, Reports, Upload, Knowledge Wiki, and Research Explorer
Check rendering, responsiveness, websocket stability, CSS rendering, and navigation

userStories.title: Phase 14 - Stress Testing
userStories.description: Run multiple simultaneous analyses, uploads, and open multiple browser tabs.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify memory stability and CPU stability
Verify no crashes or state corruption occur under load

userStories.title: Phase 15 - Failure Testing
userStories.description: Simulate and verify failure scenarios.
acceptanceCriteria: Simulate backend offline, missing report, missing wiki, invalid project ID, invalid upload, and failed LLM call
Verify graceful error handling in all cases

userStories.title: Phase 16 - Security Review
userStories.description: Inspect codebase and behavior for security vulnerabilities.
acceptanceCriteria: Inspect file uploads and prompt injection risks
Inspect API validation, path traversal risks, and secret handling
Identify specific vulnerabilities

userStories.title: Phase 17 - Performance Review
userStories.description: Measure and record performance metrics.
acceptanceCriteria: Measure startup time, workflow latency, API latency, memory usage, and CPU usage
Identify specific bottlenecks

userStories.title: Phase 18 - Deployment Review
userStories.description: Verify deployment structures.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify Docker and Docker Compose setup
Verify Environment Variables and Health Checks
Verify overall deployment reliability

userStories.title: Phase 19 - Feature Claim Audit
userStories.description: Audit advertised vs. implemented features.
acceptanceCriteria: Create a table comparing Feature, Advertised, Implemented, Verified Working, and Evidence
Include LangGraph, CrewAI, AutoGen, Knowledge Wiki, Living Wiki, Research Planner, Multi-Hop Navigation, Research Memory, Human-in-the-Loop, Multi-LLM Routing, Report Generation, and Docker
Only mark as working if demonstrated with evidence

userStories.title: Phase 20 - Final Engineering Report
userStories.description: Compile the final engineering report detailing working/broken features and overall score.
acceptanceCriteria: Produce lists for: Working Features, Partially Working Features, Broken Features, Missing Features, Runtime Issues, Security Issues, Reliability Issues, Performance Issues, Deployment Issues
Provide score out of 10 for: Architecture Score, Implementation Score, Reliability Score, Production Readiness Score
Explicitly answer: 'Does StartupPilot AI genuinely deliver the capabilities it claims to provide?' based on observed evidence
